narrative:
Lima 4D (precinct in Allen County) has 944 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.3%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
